text: Ready? White to blue in one pass. Let's do it. Here we go. That's so weird. I can feel like cooling. Wow, it's all blue. Full saturation, no dye, no residue. That is incredible. It looks like a completely different outfit and it won't wash out. Thanks.

title: Dubai’s Next-Gen AI Fashion Machine 🤖🎨 Real-Time Outfit Color Tech!
